issues.sample: The car seats show that they have the anchors in the back seat for a child’s car seat. We do not have any anchors for our back seat.  At all. But do have the indicators that we do have them  on the seats.
INSIDE OF THE VEHICLE SMELLS FUEL ONCE IN A WEEK WHEN I CONTACTED THE COMPANY THEY TOLD ME THAT THERE'S NO RECALLS ON MY VEHICLE WHEN I MADE MY SEARCH I FOUND THOSE RECALLS   RECALL I'D 227693

THERE IS A RAIN-DETECTING AUTO WIPER FUNCTION SETTING WITH THIS CAR.  WHEN USING THE AUTO SETTING, THE WIPERS WILL FIRE RANDOMLY WHEN THERE IS NO MOISTURE WHATSOEVER.  THIS CAN HAPPEN IN HOT OR COLD WEATHER AND REGARDLESS OF WHETHER THE CAR IS MOVING OR STATIONARY.  WHILE I HAVE
